subcodes.first_line: O thou who speakest in remembrance of God! They say that man is endowed with speech, meaning he perceiveth universal truths and comprehendeth the mysteries of inner meanings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناطق بذکر الهی گویند انسان ناطقست یعنی مدرک حقائق کلیه و واقف اسرار معانی
subcodes.subjects: @the power of words; of speech, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
